title.en: This is the horror of the Flower of the Immorta...

content.en:
The Flower of the Immortal Lin is a rare elixir from the Origin Realm, its value is difficult to estimate, and it may be of little use to other cultivators in the universe, because other cultivators have not broken the restrictions of the universe, and it is difficult to improve the physical body, but for Ye Tian, his physical body can be cultivated, so the value of the Flower of the Immortal Lin to him is too high and too high.

Ye Tian had now cultivated the fifteenth and sixteenth sets of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Techniques to the Perfection Realm, and the progress of the eighth layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique was slow, so it was difficult to continue to improve the strength of the physical body, and the Flower of the Immortal Lin was a hope, an opportunity that would allow him to improve again in the Extreme of Domination.

Ye Tian took out the Flower of the Immortal Lin, swallowed it in one gulp, and began to refine the medicinal power of the Flower of the Immortal Lin.

Rumble!!!

The terrifying power erupted, frantically refining Ye Tian's body that had been tempered to the extreme.

If other people can't withstand such a terrifying power at all, even Tianzun can't withstand it, only the Supreme can use the power of the Supreme to block this power, but there is no way to refine it.

This is the horror of the Flower of the Immortal Lin!

"It's such a terrifying medicinal effect, and my physical body has been improved to the extreme, unless the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique improves, it is difficult to improve the strength of my physical body, but the medicinal power of the Immortal Lin Flower has once again refined my physical body. Moreover, my life level is slowly rising!!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

The life level was extremely important to him, he was now at the seventh order life level, but he was only at the beginning of the seventh order, and compared to those life level creatures of the seventh order, there was still a big gap.

In the universe, being able to raise the life level to the seventh order is already luck in luck, and it is very difficult to improve one step further, Ye Tian was only expecting that when he broke through to the Tianzun realm, he would be able to raise the life level by a small step again.

Unexpectedly, the Flower of the Immortal Lin helped him accomplish this goal.

According to Ye Tian's estimation, this Immortal Lin Flower was expected to advance his life level to the mid-seventh order realm.

Time goes by day by day!

A year later.

Ye Tian had finally refined the medicinal power of the Immortal Lin Flower.

At this time, his life level had reached the middle of the seventh order, which was definitely far beyond that of other cultivators, and even the Lord of the Yuan Gu had estimated that he was only at the peak life level of the sixth order.

Perhaps, he was the only seventh-order life in the universe cultivators!

In addition to the life level, his physical strength has increased by twenty percent, which does not seem to be much, but it has increased by twenty percent again at an almost extreme level, which is already quite remarkable.

And now, Ye Tian also truly realized the terrifying effect of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique.

Even a heaven-defying treasure such as the Flower of the Immortal Lin could only advance his physical strength by two percent, but the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique could continuously advance the limit of his physical body many times, and the effect was terrifying!

"The value of the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique is even greater than the value of the entire Human Race, or even the entire God Race!"

Ye Tian guessed.

However, this kind of anti-heaven exercise came from chaos, and it was limited to oaths, and he couldn't give it to others.

"Let's end the retreat for the time being, I'm in a bottleneck period now, and I won't improve quickly in other aspects, so I can't improve my strength quickly, go to the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, and ask the Kunwu Supreme about the situation of the Abyss of Destruction!"

With a single thought, Ye Tian's incarnation went to the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

Soon, Ye Tian met with Kunwu Supreme.

At this meeting, the Kunwu Supreme felt a trace of threat from Ye Tian's body, of course, it was only a trace of danger, in terms of real strength, Ye Tian was naturally far from being the opponent of the Kunwu Supreme.

"Ye Tian, your strength has improved a lot, even I feel a hint of threat!"

Kunwu Supreme said with a smile.

"Kunwu Supreme said with a smile, my strength is still far behind, I came to learn about the situation of the Abyss of Destruction!"

Ye Tiandao.

As soon as Kunwu Supreme heard the Abyss of Destruction, he immediately became solemn and said, "Those Supremes of the Twelve Universe Era used half of the Chaos Arcana to suppress the Universe Origin, and the Universe Origin does not suppress the Destruction Abyss now, so we can only seal the Destruction Abyss." Right now, the Abyss of Destruction has been sealed, but it can't be completely sealed, those Destruction Kings are still impacting the seal, they may not be able to rush out, but they can send some Destruction creatures out, so it has always needed a lot of Supremes to suppress there. Judging by the current situation, there is no good way. However, the Supremes of the Twelve Universe Ages promised that they would find a way to solve this matter. Hey, if it weren't for our strength being too weak, how could we be led by the supremes of the Twelve Universe Eras!"

Ye Tian also nodded helplessly.

In terms of strength, the supremes of the twelve cosmic epochs are indeed too powerful, that is the most powerful supreme of the twelve cosmic epochs, and now this cosmic epoch is only in the early and middle stages, and this era belongs to the weak new cosmic era, and the supremes born are naturally not strong, and there is no accumulation of time, it is impossible to compete with the supremes of the twelve cosmic eras.

"When I step into the Tianzun realm, I may be able to change this situation, but the Dual Universe Transcendence Plan has already begun, and the Universe Origin has been suppressed, even if I reach the Tianzun realm and instantly have the combat power beyond the Lord of the Yuangu, there is no way to stop the suppression of the Chaos Treasure. Moreover, it won't be long before the two universes collide, and nothing can be stopped. "

Ye Tian sighed secretly.

Ye Tian chatted with Kunwu Supreme for a long time and had a general understanding of the basic situation.

Suddenly, Kunwu Supreme said, "Ye Tian, do you have a basic understanding of your current combat strength?"

Ye Tian shook his head: "I don't know, my strength has improved too quickly, and I haven't had too many fights with the Tianzun level, and I don't have a general judgment, but it's very simple for me to kill the average Tianzun!"

"I have a way to test your approximate combat strength!" said Kungo Supreme.

"Oh, what's the solution?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"There is a Mixed Yuan Pagoda in the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, which is the strongest treasure found by the Mixed Yuan Supreme from a ruin, which can test the combat effectiveness of the strong above the Heavenly Venerable. Today's universe divides the combat power above the Heavenly Venerable into many grades. They are the fifth-class Celestial, the fourth-class Celestial, the third-class Celestial, the second-class Celestial, and the first-class Celestial. The first-class Heavenly Venerable is the Extreme Heavenly Venerable second only to the Supreme Level. Above the first-class Heavenly Venerable is the Supreme Combat Power, and the Supreme Level is also divided into five levels, which are also the fifth-class Supreme, the Fourth-Class Supreme, the Third-Class Supreme, the Second-Class Supreme, and the First-Class Supreme. In today's universe, most of the supremes are fifth-class supremes, fourth-class supremes can be called powerful supremes, and third-class supremes can be called top supremes. And I am a powerful supreme of the fourth rank limit, second only to the top supreme. The Mixed Yuan Supreme is the only top Supreme of our human race, but the Mixed Yuan Supreme is very sorry for his life, the main body has never made a move, it is all a doppelganger, and his strongest doppelganger is only a fourth-class Supreme. The first god lord of the Protoss is the top third-class supreme. "

Kunwu Supreme Dao.

"What about the second-class supreme, do all the races have such a supreme?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Not at the moment!" "None at the moment," Kunwu Supreme shook his head, "Unless the First God Lord and the First Demon Lord make a breakthrough, the Second Order Supreme will be born." Most of those supremes in the Twelve Universe Era were second-class supremes, and the eight or nine most terrifying supremes such as the Golden Light Supreme and the Lord of the Yuan Gu were first-class supremes, and they could easily kill a group of third-class supremes in seconds, and even a single look could kill a fourth-rank supreme like me in an instant!"

This moment.

Ye Tian finally had a clear understanding of the division of combat power above Tianzun, and such a division was obviously a top secret, once it spread, it would make many human races desperate, after all, the supreme of the human race was too weak!

It was precisely because of this that the human race sealed off such divisions and prevented cultivators below the Heavenly Venerable from knowing about them.

"Ye Tian, let's go, I'll take you to the Mixed Yuan Pagoda of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain to test your combat power!"

Kunwu Supreme Dao.
